productDisplayName: Femella Women Snake Print Wrap Beige Top
description: Style NoteStrikingly chic, this top from femella is a detail-oriented deconstruction of a wardrobe essential. Offering a flowy silhouette, you can pair ths one with a pencil skirt or a pair of jeans for a casual to semi formal look. Strappy sandals for your feet is what we would say complements the look best.Product DetailsBeige snake print top made of blended fabric, has a plunging V-neckline, long sleeves, tie up detail on the waist and ruffles at the napeMaterial and CareBlended fabricWash dark colours separatelyDry inside outDo not bleach or wringWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") wears a size M
